page: Vultr voc-g-32c-128gb-640s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute instance powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor. It features 32 vCPUs and 32 physical cores operating at a base clock speed of 2.0 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is bundled with a 640 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

In benchmark evaluations, this instance demonstrates strong multi-core capabilities and excellent memory throughput. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance ranks in the top 10%, while multi-core performance falls within the top 25%. Large-block memory bandwidth benchmarks, both read and write, achieve top-tier results in the top 10% category. Additionally, the instance delivers strong performance in cryptographic operations, physics simulations, and Redis SET operations, which reach 73.66 million operations per second.

Although the CPU allocation is shared, the high physical core count and substantial memory capacity offer a cost-effective resource density for multi-threaded workloads. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it highly suitable for general-purpose applications, database hosting, multi-threaded decompression tasks, and static web serving. However, workloads requiring dedicated CPU pinning or maximum single-threaded performance may need to account for the shared CPU allocation model.
description: The Vultr voc-g-32c-128gb-640s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute instance featuring 32 vCPUs and 32 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor on the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core, and includes 640 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Benchmark results highlight top-tier single-core CPU performance and large-block memory bandwidth, alongside strong multi-core processing and Redis SET operations. While the CPU allocation is shared, the instance offers high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for multi-threaded applications. It is well-suited for general-purpose workloads, database operations, static web serving, and multi-threaded data decompression.
og_description: Vultr voc-g-32c-128gb-640s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute instance featuring 32 AMD EPYC Milan vCPUs, 128 GB of RAM, and a 640 GB NVMe SSD, delivering strong multi-core and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Vultr voc-g-32c-128gb-640s-amd features 32 AMD EPYC Milan vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 640 GB NVMe SSD for balanced general-purpose and database workloads.
tagline: A balanced multi-core virtual server featuring high-speed NVMe storage and top-tier memory bandwidth for demanding general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 32-core AMD EPYC Milan processor on x86_64 architecture
Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM and 640 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier memory bandwidth and single-core CPU benchmark performance
Shared CPU allocation model offering high qualitative resource density
Optimized for database operations, static web serving, and multi-threaded tasks
